key_findings: GPU Factor Mining 2026 (11th unique domain): ① CogAlpha ACL 2026 Oral — 7-layer 21-agent hierarchy, code-based evolution, CSI300 excess 16.39%, IR 1.90 ② DolphinDB Shark GPLearn — 30x GPU acceleration, multi-GPU parallel GP ③ 东吴证券 dual-path — LLM-enhanced GP + closed-loop function mining, |RankIC| 6.98%, ICIR 0.79, sample-out decay 0.08pp ④ QuantaAlpha GPT-5.2 — trajectory evolution, IC=0.1501, annual 27.75%, max DD 7.98% ⑤ AlphaForge AAAI — generative-predictive NN + dynamic factor combination ⑥ 2026 consensus: LLM+GP fusion, code>formula, multi-agent, self-growing tool libraries. Direct: moni GPU factory redesign inspiration.

Multi-Agent Verifiable Gates 2026 (12th unique domain): ① 36.94% failures are coordination not model failures ② Nexus Agents — governance substrate with drift-detected charter, immutable audit, LinUCB+TOPSIS telemetry ③ SpecD — mandatory verification lifecycle, drift prevention via spec checks ④ Kitchen Loop — 285+ iterations, 1,094+ PRs, zero regressions via UAT+drift control ⑤ 2026 critical: deterministic layer (lint/type/security/tests) must be separate from AI augmentation layer ⑥ Evidence-based handoff contracts with verifiable artifact refs ⑦ Context discipline: orchestrator sees plans, executor sees task spec only. Direct: autonomous-engine governance hardening.
12 distinct research domains now indexed. Marginal utility of new domains decreasing but both selections have high direct applicability.
research.note: 2/2 queries returned 7+ independent high-quality 2026 sources each. GPU factor mining: academic (ACL/AAAI/arXiv) + commercial (DolphinDB Shark) + industry (东吴证券). Multi-agent gates: open-source (Nexus/SpecD/Reins/Roady) + production-validated (Kitchen Loop 285+ iterations) + industry analysis (Codacy/Agiflow). Both domains are NEW — not covered in prior 17 L3 cycles.
